item.title: Android API Levels and Usage
item.description: The Android API Levels and their usage in the market can be seen in the Android Studio when creating a new project.

item.title: git snippets
item.description: Amending changes in a commit without modifying the message 1 git commit -a --amend --no-edit Displaying only the files modified in a commit 1 git show --pretty="" --name-status <commit-ref> Browsing the repository on a local web interface 1 git instaweb (It requires [[lighttpd]] or other httpd daemon.

item.title: grep
item.description: Find a string in all files of a folder ( source): 1 grep -nr '<string>' .

item.title: iterm2 notifications
item.description: We can get different triggers for post notifications when certain events happen in iterm2. When a a command finishes (even if it’s chained with other commands):

item.title: Jenkins Git Plugin
item.description: Refspec A refspec maps remote branches to local references. It defines the branches and tags which will be fetched from the remote repository into the agent workspace.

item.title: KeyCode.info
item.description: KeyCode.info is a site that will automatically display keycode information for any combination of keys pressed.

item.title: line_profiler
item.description: line_profiler is a pip package that can be used to profile python code, and get a result with line-by-line execution details.

item.title: MockServiceWorker
item.description: MockServiceWorker (MSW) is a Javascript tool that uses a service worker to mock HTTP requests. Webpage How to use it for different tests You can just define different handlers (responses generators) and add them to the appropriate test cases.

item.title: RegEx tester tools
item.description: A few regex tester tools that are great to have handy: Regexr RegEx 101
